title: Dirty Plugin Stale Dependencies
objective: A disposable user state with an installed external plugin whose package metadata and stale node_modules marker model dependency drift after runtime or release changes.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Stale Dependencies
setup.intent: Install a plugin-inspector-shaped dirty plugin with stale dependency evidence inside the disposable env.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-stale-deps

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Stale Dependencies
setup.intent: Verify dirty dependency evidence remains explicit after plugin inspection, doctor repair, and restart.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-stale-deps
evidence: stale dependency marker checksum still matches

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes stale dependency fixture files

source.note: installed plugin with stale node_modules marker and dependency metadata
